reference: My son has a fever of thirty-seven point five degrees Celsius, his eyes are sensitive to light, he has a mild headache, and mild abdominal pain. He also has a sore throat, which was worse this morning, but he can still feel it when he swallows. Is there something specific I should be watching for?
text: My son has a fever of thirty-seven point five degrees Celsius. His eyes are sensitive to light. He has a mild headache and mild abdominal pain. He also has a sore throat, which was worse this morning, but he can still feel it when he swallows. Is there something specific I should be watching for?
